intraday_playbook_rows.description: Intraday trigger playbook rows. Must include ORB up/down scenarios, macro or catalyst reaction, mid-day reversal, late-day Fed/VIX behavior, and MOC imbalance.

action.description: Binary action. Render the first word in bold in HTML rows.

positioning_primary.description: Entry-point summary: overall position sizing or positioning bias for today.

positioning_secondary.description: Entry-point summary: hedge, balance, or portfolio offset instruction for today.

positioning_watch.description: Entry-point summary: the single most important market watch for today.

section_pre_market_movers_primary_action.description: Pre-market movers: positive instruction, what to do today.

section_pre_market_movers_condition_acti.description: Pre-market movers: conditional instruction in the form if X happens, then Y.

section_pre_market_movers_avoid_action.description: Pre-market movers: negative instruction, what to avoid today.
